stories.problemStatement: The refinement session notes mix backlog changes, implementation questions, and approval concerns, which makes it hard to convert them into a sprint-ready story. This slows down handoff to delivery and increases the chance that important constraints are lost.
stories.storySummary: As a refinement facilitator, I want to turn messy notes into a structured user story so that I can help the team review, estimate, and commit with less rework.
acceptanceCriteria: Given messy notes are provided, when the facilitator runs refinement, then the response includes the required sections in the exact order.
Should flag any mismatch between the problem statement and the proposed story before the final story is written.
Should include dependencies, references, estimation, and DoR validation even when some values are missing.
dependencies: A program lead vision or backlog discussion notes
A parent epic link from the planning workspace
definitionOfReadyValidation: Problem statement present and aligned with story
User story follows As a / I want / So that format
⚠️ DoR GAP: Sprint identifier not provided
stories.label: refinement-facilitation
gaps: ⚠️Clarification needed: confirm the target role for the story.
No sample epics were included in the notes.
normalizationNotes: Converted informal notes into one sprint-sized story.
